features: 2 packs massage sponges, 3 pieces per pack in different colours
description: Product description This item includes 2 packs of massage sponges, each containing 3 pieces in assorted colors, total 6 units. The sponges, produced by the renowned brand Cotton Tree, are of the 'schwamm' type and classified as 'BATHING_SPONGE'. Each pack includes 3 sponges of different shades, offering a touch of variety to your bath ritual. Made from high quality materials, they are ideal for a relaxing and rejuvenating massage. We recommend that you follow the instructions provided for washing and caring for the product. Directions After use, always rinse and dry thoroughly. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Safety Warning Warning: may cause skin irritation if used improperly. Contains natural fibres that may cause allergic reactions in some people. Test before use and if there are signs of skin irritation or allergies, do not use the product. See more
